overall.description: Game engine footage showing a character in a yellow jacket exploring a beachside bar area at sunset, followed by a transition to a cinematic water-level view of a long pier extending into the ocean during golden hour. The clip features warm sunset lighting and detailed coastal architecture.

segments.scene_description: A character in a yellow jacket stands on a wooden deck at a beachside bar during golden hour. The character raises their weapon to aim, then walks off to the left. The bar features red stools and a wooden railing, with palm trees and urban buildings visible in the background under a clear sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ocean shoreline with long pier at sunset

events.description: hard cut from beach bar to water-level view at the shoreline facing the setting sun
camera begins moving slowly along the water's edge parallel to the pier

agents.ego_description: camera moves slowly along the shoreline observing the pier structure and sunset reflection on the water

entered.detail: long wooden pier with multiple support pillars extending into the ocean
calm ocean water reflecting the golden sunset light
wet sand at the water's edge with small waves lapping
bright sun low on the horizon creating intense golden orange light
smaller wooden pier or dock structure visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a cinematic water-level view of a long wooden pier extending into the ocean during a vibrant sunset. The camera moves slowly along the shoreline, capturing the reflection of the golden sun on the calm water and the weathered wooden pillars of the pier. A distant dock structure becomes visible on the left as the camera progresses along the beach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from an intimate deck scene at a beachside bar to a sweeping, water-level vista of a coastal pier. It begins on a wooden deck where a character in a yellow jacket aims a weapon before walking off to the left, leaving behind a view of red stools and palm trees against a clear sunset sky. As the perspective descends and glides away from the bar, the scene transitions into a cinematic low-angle view along the shoreline. The camera then moves slowly across the calm water, capturing the golden reflections of the sun and the weathered wooden pillars of a long pier. Finally, the view expands across the ocean surface as a distant dock structure emerges on the left under the vibrant glow of the golden hour.
